name: Are there launch arguments that allow fabric launcher to ignore
snippet: You can use a Fabric Dependency Override to override Create's fabric.mod.json, which is where it declares the Minecraft version it says its for.

name: Loader erroneously thinks that a version number string is empty in
snippet: This issue happened to me when a mod dependency in my fabric.mod.json had a version number written like so: "<dependency>": ">= <version>"

name: Mod Menu Dependency - Fabric Modding Minecraft 1.20.6 | #21
snippet: Modding Minecraft 1.20.6 - Fabric MC: Mod Menu Dependency Mod Menu is a nice mod to add as a dependency to almost every mod you develop.
